name: io.github.just-an-oldsalt/bob-ross
description: Manage a Canonical Landscape estate from an MCP client — inventory, patching, script execution, reboots — with a safety layer (read-only default, dry-run/confirm, blast-radius preview).

environmentVariables.name: BOBROSS_LANDSCAPE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Landscape server (no trailing /api/).

environmentVariables.name: BOBROSS_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Legacy HMAC access key (use with BOBROSS_SECRET_KEY).

environmentVariables.name: BOBROSS_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: REST bearer token (alternative to the HMAC key pair).

environmentVariables.name: BOBROSS_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Second switch required to enable writes (default false).
